requirement_topic.en: Lithium Battery Transport Safety Testing — UN 38.3

summary.en: All lithium cells and batteries (including BESS modules) shipped internationally must pass the UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 test series (T1–T8: altitude simulation, thermal, vibration, shock, external short circuit, impact/crush, overcharge, forced discharge). The current edition is Rev.8 (2023) with Amendment 1 (2025) (ST/SG/AC.10/11/Rev.8). A UN 38.3 test summary or full test report must accompany each shipment. Slovakia is landlocked; BESS shipments from China typically arrive by sea at Hamburg (Germany) or Koper (Slovenia) and then continue by road (ADR) or rail through Central Europe. Transport by road in Europe is governed by ADR (European Agreement concerning the International Carriage of Dangerous Goods by Road); by sea by IMDG Code; by air by IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations.
summary.zh: 所有国际运输的锂电芯及电池（包括BESS模块）须通过《联合国关于危险货物运输的建议书——试验和标准手册》第三部分第38.3节T1–T8系列测试（高度模拟、热稳定性、振动、冲击、外部短路、撞击/挤压、过充、强制放电）。现行版本为Rev.8（2023年）及修正案1（2025年）（ST/SG/AC.10/11/Rev.8）。每票货物须随附UN 38.3测试摘要或完整报告。斯洛伐克为内陆国，来自中国的BESS货物通常经德国汉堡港或斯洛文尼亚科佩尔港入境，再经公路（ADR）或铁路转运至中欧。欧洲公路运输受ADR规管，海运受IMDG Code规管，空运受IATA危险品规则规管。
summary.zht: 所有國際運輸的鋰電芯及電池（包括BESS模組）須通過《聯合國關於危險貨物運輸的建議書——試驗和標準手冊》第三部分第38.3節T1–T8系列測試（高度模擬、熱穩定性、振動、衝擊、外部短路、撞擊/擠壓、過充、強制放電）。現行版本為Rev.8（2023年）及修正案1（2025年）（ST/SG/AC.10/11/Rev.8）。每票貨物須隨附UN 38.3測試摘要或完整報告。斯洛伐克為內陸國，來自中國的BESS貨物通常經德國漢堡港或斯洛維尼亞科佩爾港入境，再經公路（ADR）或鐵路轉運至中歐。歐洲公路運輸受ADR規管，海運受IMDG Code規管，空運受IATA危險品規則規管。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 (ST/SG/AC.10/11/Rev.8 (2023) and Amendment 1 (2025))
UN Model Regulations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods, 23rd revised edition — UN 3480 / UN 3481
ADR 2025 — European Agreement concerning the International Carriage of Dangerous Goods by Road (Special Provisions 188, 230, 310, 348, 636, 670)
IMDG Code, Amendment 41-22 — Special Provisions 188, 230, 310, 348, 384, 636
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR) 65th Edition 2024 — Special Provisions A88, A99, A154, A164, A183, A201, A206

summary.en: China applies the same UN 38.3 test standard for export shipments and mirrors it in national regulations. For road transport, the standard GB 15599 (Safety requirements for transport of lithium batteries by road) references UN 38.3. China's GB 38031-2020 (Electric vehicles traction battery safety requirements) mandates UN 38.3-equivalent tests for vehicle-grade cells but is not a transport regulation. Export customs and the Ministry of Transport require a valid UN 38.3 test report and dangerous goods declaration per JT/T 617 (road) and IMDG/IATA rules for maritime/air. The Civil Aviation Administration of China (CAAC) DGR follows IATA. The exact current edition of GB 15599 and any amendments issued after 2024 are not publicly confirmable via open sources — verify the current edition via SAC or the Ministry of Transport before relying on it.
summary.zh: 中国对出口货物同样适用UN 38.3测试标准，并在国内法规中予以对应。公路运输参照GB 15599（锂电池公路运输安全要求），该标准引用UN 38.3。GB 38031-2020（电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求）对车用电芯规定了UN 38.3等效测试，但并非运输法规。海关及交通运输部要求持有效UN 38.3测试报告并按JT/T 617（公路）及IMDG/IATA规则进行危险货物申报。中国民用航空局（CAAC）危险品规则遵循IATA。GB 15599的现行有效版本及2024年后的修订情况无法通过公开渠道确认，请在引用前向国家标准化管理委员会或交通运输部核实。
summary.zht: 中國對出口貨物同樣適用UN 38.3測試標準，並在國內法規中予以對應。公路運輸參照GB 15599（鋰電池公路運輸安全要求），該標準引用UN 38.3。GB 38031-2020（電動汽車用動力蓄電池安全要求）對車用電芯規定了UN 38.3等效測試，但並非運輸法規。海關及交通運輸部要求持有效UN 38.3測試報告並按JT/T 617（公路）及IMDG/IATA規則進行危險貨物申報。中國民用航空局（CAAC）危險品規則遵循IATA。GB 15599的現行有效版本及2024年後的修訂情況無法通過公開渠道確認，請在引用前向國家標準化管理委員會或交通運輸部核實。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Section 38.3 (adopted for export)
GB 38031-2020 — Electric vehicles traction battery safety requirements (cell-level UN 38.3 equivalent)
GB 15599 — Safety requirements for transport of lithium batteries by road (current edition not publicly confirmable via open sources — verify via SAC or Ministry of Transport before relying on it)
JT/T 617 — Regulations for road transport of dangerous goods
CAAC Dangerous Goods Regulations (aligned with IATA DGR)

gap.en: Both EU/international and China require UN 38.3 testing, so the test protocol itself is not a gap. The gaps lie in documentation and enforcement: (1) EU/ADR strictly enforces the UN 38.3 test summary requirement at the shipper level — the summary must be available on request for every consignment, including cell-level T1–T8 data; CN exporters sometimes hold only a product certificate without the full summary. (2) ADR 2025 introduces updated provisions on state-of-charge (SOC ≤30%) limits and packaging for large-format BESS cells. (3) IATA PI 965/966/967 Section II thresholds are strictly enforced by EU carriers. (4) For Slovakia-bound BESS, multimodal shipments (sea to Hamburg or Koper + ADR road through Germany, Austria, or Hungary) require re-documentation at the EU port of entry to ADR — a step often missed by CN-origin shipments prepared only to IMDG. (5) Some EU member states may require prior notification or route approval for large BESS road shipments above defined energy thresholds.
gap.zh: 欧盟/国际与中国均要求UN 38.3测试，测试协议本身不构成差距。差距在于文件与执法：(1) 欧盟/ADR严格要求托运方层面提供UN 38.3测试摘要（非仅证书），须按需提供每票货物含电芯级T1–T8数据的摘要；部分中国出口商仅持产品认证证书而无完整摘要。(2) ADR 2025对大型BESS电芯的荷电状态（SOC≤30%）及包装要求有更新规定。(3) IATA PI 965/966/967 Section II瓦时限值由欧洲承运人严格执行。(4) 对于发往斯洛伐克的BESS，多式联运（海运至汉堡或科佩尔港+经德国、奥地利或匈牙利ADR公路运输）需在欧盟入境港按ADR重新出具文件——仅按IMDG准备的中国发货往往遗漏此环节。(5) 部分欧盟成员国对超过特定能量阈值的大型BESS公路运输可能要求提前通知或路线审批。
gap.zht: 歐盟/國際與中國均要求UN 38.3測試，測試協議本身不構成差距。差距在於文件與執法：(1) 歐盟/ADR嚴格要求托運方層面提供UN 38.3測試摘要（非僅證書），須按需提供每票貨物含電芯級T1–T8數據的摘要；部分中國出口商僅持產品認證證書而無完整摘要。(2) ADR 2025對大型BESS電芯的荷電狀態（SOC≤30%）及包裝要求有更新規定。(3) IATA PI 965/966/967 Section II瓦時限值由歐洲承運人嚴格執行。(4) 對於發往斯洛伐克的BESS，多式聯運（海運至漢堡或科佩爾港+經德國、奧地利或匈牙利ADR公路運輸）需在歐盟入境港按ADR重新出具文件——僅按IMDG準備的中國發貨往往遺漏此環節。(5) 部分歐盟成員國對超過特定能量閾值的大型BESS公路運輸可能要求提前通知或路線審批。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UN 38.3 compliance and dangerous goods documentation are legal requirements for all international transport modes under ADR/IMDG/IATA and are enforced by carriers, freight forwarders, and customs authorities. For Slovakia-bound BESS, ADR compliance is required for the road transit leg from the entry port.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export — UN 38.3 test report required by customs and carriers; GB 38031-2020 mandatory for EV battery cells sold in China.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational only. A Chinese BESS exporter shipping to Slovakia must hold a valid UN 38.3 test report (T1–T8 summary) for every cell/module type, classify under UN 3480 or UN 3481, comply with IMDG (sea to Hamburg or Koper), and then comply with ADR (road from entry port to Slovakia). Multimodal re-documentation at the EU port of entry is required. Consult a certified dangerous goods safety adviser (DGSA) before first shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考。中国BESS出口商向斯洛伐克发货，须为每种电芯/模块型号持有有效UN 38.3测试报告（T1–T8摘要），按UN 3480或UN 3481分类，符合IMDG（海运至汉堡或科佩尔港），再符合ADR（从入境港陆路运至斯洛伐克）。在欧盟入境港须重新出具多式联运文件。首次发货前请咨询具资质的危险品安全顾问（DGSA）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考。中國BESS出口商向斯洛伐克發貨，須為每種電芯/模組型號持有有效UN 38.3測試報告（T1–T8摘要），按UN 3480或UN 3481分類，符合IMDG（海運至漢堡或科佩爾港），再符合ADR（從入境港陸路運至斯洛伐克）。在歐盟入境港須重新出具多式聯運文件。首次發貨前請諮詢具資質的危險品安全顧問（DGSA）。

requirement_topic.en: Dangerous Goods Classification, Packaging & Documentation — ADR / IMDG / IATA
requirement_topic.zh: 危险品分类、包装及文件——ADR / IMDG / IATA
requirement_topic.zht: 危險品分類、包裝及文件——ADR / IMDG / IATA

summary.en: Beyond UN 38.3 testing, EU/international transport law requires: (a) correct UN number (UN 3480/3481) and packing group on all shipping documents; (b) compliant outer packaging (UN-certified for full lithium batteries); (c) shipper's Declaration for Dangerous Goods (DGD) for air, or Dangerous Goods Transport Document for road/sea; (d) emergency response information (e.g., ERG, MSDS/SDS); (e) placarding and labelling (Class 9 hazard label, lithium battery mark). For Slovakia-bound shipments, road transit from the entry port (Hamburg or Koper) through EU member states (Germany, Austria, Hungary or similar) must comply with ADR 2025 throughout the transit legs, not only in Slovakia itself.
summary.zh: 除UN 38.3测试外，欧盟/国际运输法规还要求：(a) 所有运输单证上注明正确UN编号（UN 3480/3481）及包装组别；(b) 合规外包装（整体锂电池须UN认证包装）；(c) 空运须填写危险品申报单（DGD），公路/海运须填写危险品运输文件；(d) 紧急响应信息（如ERG、MSDS/SDS）；(e) 包装及车辆须贴附标记及标签（第9类危险标签、锂电池标识）。对于发往斯洛伐克的货物，从入境港（汉堡或科佩尔）经欧盟成员国（德国、奥地利、匈牙利等）的公路转运全程须符合ADR 2025，而不仅限于斯洛伐克境内。
summary.zht: 除UN 38.3測試外，歐盟/國際運輸法規還要求：(a) 所有運輸單證上註明正確UN編號（UN 3480/3481）及包裝組別；(b) 合規外包裝（整體鋰電池須UN認證包裝）；(c) 空運須填寫危險品申報單（DGD），公路/海運須填寫危險品運輸文件；(d) 緊急響應信息（如ERG、MSDS/SDS）；(e) 包裝及車輛須貼附標記及標籤（第9類危險標籤、鋰電池標識）。對於發往斯洛伐克的貨物，從入境港（漢堡或科佩爾）經歐盟成員國（德國、奧地利、匈牙利等）的公路轉運全程須符合ADR 2025，而不僅限於斯洛伐克境內。

standards_or_laws: ADR 2025 — Chapter 3.3 SP 377, SP 188, SP 230; Section 2.2.9.1; Packing Instructions P903, P908
IMDG Code Amendment 41-22 — SP 188, SP 230, SP 384; Packing Instructions P903, P908
IATA DGR 65th Edition 2024 — Packing Instructions PI 965, PI 966, PI 967; Special Provisions A88, A99, A154, A164, A183
UN Model Regulations 23rd revised edition — Chapter 3.3, Chapter 6.1 packaging requirements
Regulation (EC) No 1272/2008 (CLP) — for SDS/labelling obligations where applicable

summary.en: China's export dangerous goods documentation requirements align with IMDG and IATA for sea and air freight. For road within China, JT/T 617.1-2018 (Classification of dangerous goods for road transport) and JT/T 617.4-2018 (Packaging and labelling) apply. The China Civil Aviation Administration (CAAC) DGR mirrors IATA PI 965/966/967. Export customs (GACC) requires a dangerous goods inspection certificate for certain battery shipments. Packaging must meet GB 12463 (General technical requirements for dangerous goods transport packaging) for domestic road, or UN-certified packaging for export. The precise scope of GACC inspection certificate requirements for BESS exports is subject to GACC administrative announcements that change periodically; verify the current requirements directly with a licensed Chinese customs broker or GACC before shipment.
summary.zh: 中国出口危险品文件要求与海运IMDG和空运IATA保持一致。中国境内公路运输适用JT/T 617.1-2018（公路运输危险货物品名表）和JT/T 617.4-2018（包装及标识）。中国民用航空局（CAAC）危险品规则参照IATA PI 965/966/967。海关总署（GACC）对特定电池出口要求危险品检验证书。国内公路运输包装须符合GB 12463（危险货物运输包装通用技术条件），出口须采用UN认证包装。GACC对BESS出口的危险品检验证书要求范围受GACC不定期发布的行政公告规范，可能随时变化，出货前请直接向持牌中国报关行或GACC核实现行要求。
summary.zht: 中國出口危險品文件要求與海運IMDG和空運IATA保持一致。中國境內公路運輸適用JT/T 617.1-2018（公路運輸危險貨物品名表）和JT/T 617.4-2018（包裝及標識）。中國民用航空局（CAAC）危險品規則參照IATA PI 965/966/967。海關總署（GACC）對特定電池出口要求危險品檢驗證書。國內公路運輸包裝須符合GB 12463（危險貨物運輸包裝通用技術條件），出口須採用UN認證包裝。GACC對BESS出口的危險品檢驗證書要求範圍受GACC不定期發布的行政公告規範，可能隨時變化，出貨前請直接向持牌中國報關行或GACC核實現行要求。

standards_or_laws: JT/T 617.1-2018 — Classification of dangerous goods for road transport (China)
JT/T 617.4-2018 — Packaging and labelling for dangerous goods road transport (China)
GB 12463 — General technical requirements for dangerous goods transport packaging
CAAC Dangerous Goods Regulations (aligned with IATA DGR — exact current edition year not publicly confirmable via open sources; verify via CAAC or a certified DGR trainer before reliance)

GACC dangerous goods inspection requirements for battery exports (exact threshold and scope subject to periodic GACC administrative announcements — verify with a licensed Chinese customs broker before shipment)

gap.en: Key gaps for a Chinese BESS exporter shipping to Slovakia: (1) EU ADR requires a Dangerous Goods Safety Adviser (DGSA) to be appointed by the carrier — this role is not always mirrored in CN export logistics chains. (2) EU carriers and ports strictly enforce the Class 9 lithium battery mark (IEC 62133-format label with watt-hour rating) on each package outer. (3) ADR 2025 updated special provisions for large-energy battery consignments with additional notification requirements. (4) For the Slovak route via Hamburg or Koper, re-documentation from IMDG to ADR must occur at the EU port of entry and must be in place before the road transit through Germany, Austria, or Hungary begins. (5) Some EU member states require prior notification or route approval for large BESS road shipments above defined energy thresholds — relevant for the transit countries on the Hamburg-to-Slovakia or Koper-to-Slovakia road routes.
gap.zh: 中国BESS出口商向斯洛伐克发货的主要差距：(1) 欧盟ADR要求承运人任命危险品安全顾问（DGSA），该职责在中国出口物流链中并不总是有对应安排。(2) 欧盟承运人和港口严格要求每件外包装贴附第9类锂电池标记（含瓦时标注的IEC 62133格式标签）。(3) ADR 2025对大能量电池托运更新了特殊规定，增加了通知要求。(4) 对于经汉堡或科佩尔港至斯洛伐克的运输路线，须在欧盟入境港完成从IMDG到ADR的文件转换，且须在经德国、奥地利或匈牙利公路转运开始前到位。(5) 部分欧盟成员国对超过特定能量阈值的大型BESS公路运输要求提前通知或路线审批——这对汉堡至斯洛伐克或科佩尔至斯洛伐克路线途经的转运国尤为相关。
gap.zht: 中國BESS出口商向斯洛伐克發貨的主要差距：(1) 歐盟ADR要求承運人任命危險品安全顧問（DGSA），該職責在中國出口物流鏈中並不總是有對應安排。(2) 歐盟承運人和港口嚴格要求每件外包裝貼附第9類鋰電池標記（含瓦時標注的IEC 62133格式標籤）。(3) ADR 2025對大能量電池托運更新了特殊規定，增加了通知要求。(4) 對於經漢堡或科佩爾港至斯洛伐克的運輸路線，須在歐盟入境港完成從IMDG到ADR的文件轉換，且須在經德國、奧地利或匈牙利公路轉運開始前到位。(5) 部分歐盟成員國對超過特定能量閾值的大型BESS公路運輸要求提前通知或路線審批——這對漢堡至斯洛伐克或科佩爾至斯洛伐克路線途經的轉運國尤為相關。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ADR, IMDG, and IATA dangerous goods documentation, packaging, and labelling requirements are legally binding for all modes; non-compliance can result in shipment rejection, fines, or criminal liability. ADR applies to the full road transit from the entry port to Slovakia.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export — CAAC/IATA and IMDG rules enforced by carriers; JT/T 617 mandatory for domestic road; GACC inspection requirements apply to certain battery exports.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational only. Shipping BESS from China to Slovakia requires a full dangerous goods compliance programme: UN 38.3 test summaries, correct UN number classification, UN-certified packaging, IMDG documentation for the sea leg, ADR re-documentation at the EU entry port for the road leg to Slovakia, Class 9 labels, SOC management, and appointment of a DGSA for EU road legs. Engage a certified DGSA and a specialist dangerous goods freight forwarder with Central European road expertise before first shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考。从中国向斯洛伐克运输BESS需建立完整的危险品合规体系：UN 38.3测试摘要、正确的UN编号分类、UN认证包装、海运段IMDG文件、在欧盟入境港为公路段至斯洛伐克重新出具ADR文件、第9类标签、荷电状态管理，以及为欧盟公路段任命DGSA。首次发货前请聘用持证DGSA及具备中欧公路运输专业经验的危险品货代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考。從中國向斯洛伐克運輸BESS需建立完整的危險品合規體系：UN 38.3測試摘要、正確的UN編號分類、UN認證包裝、海運段IMDG文件、在歐盟入境港為公路段至斯洛伐克重新出具ADR文件、第9類標籤、荷電狀態管理，以及為歐盟公路段任命DGSA。首次發貨前請聘用持證DGSA及具備中歐公路運輸專業經驗的危險品貨代。
